description: The catchment area of the reported result. Can be at the collection site, city, province/territory, or national level.
The wastewater collection site. This is left blank if the reported results are aggregated results of multiple sites.
The city where wastewater samples were collected.. This is left blank if the reported results are aggregated results of multiple cities.
The province/territory where wastewater samples were collected.. This is left blank if the reported resutls are aggregated results of mutliple provinces/territories.
The country where wastewater samples were collected.
The year of wastewater sample collection. Based on the Sunday of the reported week.
The epidemiological week of wastewater sample collection.
The date of the Sunday of the reported week.
The respiratory virus target (covN2 represents SARS-CoV-2)
The weekly average of wastewater viral concentration. The average is adjusted for population coverage for multiple site aggregations.
The lowest recorded weekly average over the years for this specific epidemiological week.
The highest recorded weekly average over the years for this specific epidemiological week.
The percentage of population (in decimals) captured by the wastewater catchment area. This is left blank for site-level catchment areas.
Unique province or territory identifier.
Describes if the trend over the past 5 weeks is showing an increase, a decrease, no change, or no recent data for trending.
The threshold used to identify between "Low" and "Moderate" wastewater viral concentration. Thresholds are determined on the past year of viral concentrations and are unique to each location.
The threshold used to identify between "Moderate" and "High" wastewater viral concentration. Thresholds are determined on the past year of viral concentrations and are unique to each location.
A 4-level summary of the latest wastewater viral concentration. Values are Non-detect, Low, Moderate, and High.
The level of aggregation across collection sites. Values are Site, City, Province, and Canada.
Summary level of respiratory activity that is calculated from the latest levels and trends.
